symbols.name: IDataExporter
symbols.summary: Defines the contract for exporting data to various formats.

syntax.content: public interface IDataExporter

symbols.name: ExportAsync(IEnumerable, Stream, ExportOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Exports data to a stream using the specified options.

syntax.content: Task> ExportAsync(IEnumerable data, Stream outputStream, ExportOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TSource : class

parameters.description: The data to export.
The stream to write the exported data to.
Optional export options.
A token to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A result containing export information or error details.
